rcon.disconnected: 🟡 Game server disconnected — RCON connection lost

panel_channel.err_only_admin_panel_controls: [ERR] Only administrators can use panel controls.
panel_channel.err_panel_api_not_configured: [ERR] Panel API is not configured. Power controls require PANEL_SERVER_URL and PANEL_API_KEY.
panel_channel.ok_start_sent: [OK] **Start** signal sent. The server is booting up...
panel_channel.ok_stop_sent: [OK] **Stop** signal sent. The server is shutting down gracefully...
panel_channel.ok_restart_sent: [OK] **Restart** signal sent. The server will restart shortly...
panel_channel.warn_kill_sent: [WARN] **Kill** signal sent. The server process was forcefully terminated.
panel_channel.ok_backup_started: [OK] Backup creation started. It will appear in the panel shortly.
panel_channel.restart_notice: [RESTART] Restarting bot... The process will exit and your process manager should restart it.
panel_channel.factory_reset_cancelled: [ERR] Factory reset cancelled - you must type `NUKE` exactly.
panel_channel.nuke_started: [NUKE] **Factory Reset initiated.** The bot will restart, wipe all Discord messages and local data, then rebuild from server logs.
panel_channel.reimport_started: [IMPORT] **Re-Import started.** The bot will restart and re-download server logs to rebuild player stats and playtime data.
panel_channel.reimport_preserves_messages: Existing Discord messages are preserved - only local data is refreshed.
panel_channel.err_sftp_credentials_settings: [ERR] SFTP credentials not configured. Game settings require SFTP_HOST, SFTP_USER, and SFTP_PASSWORD.
panel_channel.err_only_admin_edit_bot_config: [ERR] Only administrators can edit bot config.
panel_channel.ok_env_already_up_to_date: [OK] Your `.env` is already up to date with `.env.example`.
panel_channel.err_only_admin_edit_welcome: [ERR] Only administrators can edit the welcome message.
panel_channel.factory_reset_confirm_label: Type NUKE to confirm (deletes ALL bot data)
panel_channel.warn_restart_bot_required: [WARN] **Restart the bot** for these changes to take effect.
panel_channel.warn_restart_server_required: [WARN] **Restart the server** for these changes to take effect.
panel_channel.warn_restart_bot_apply_env: [WARN] **Restart the bot** to apply new configuration keys.
panel_channel.welcome_help_intro_1: Click **Open Editor** below to edit your `WelcomeMessage.txt`.
panel_channel.welcome_help_intro_2: This is the popup players see when they join your server.
panel_channel.welcome_help_tip: **Tip:** Leave the message blank and save to restore the default auto-generated welcome with leaderboards.
panel_channel.welcome_updated_details: Written to server via SFTP and saved to .env.
panel_channel.welcome_updated_next_join: Players will see this on their next join.
panel_channel.ok_welcome_reset:
[OK] **Welcome message reset to auto-generated default!**
The welcome popup will now show leaderboards, server info, and stats.
Cleared WELCOME_FILE_LINES in .env.
panel_channel.broadcast_help_intro_1: Edit the periodic RCON messages sent to in-game chat.
panel_channel.broadcast_help_intro_2: Leave a field blank to use the built-in default message.
panel_channel.broadcast_help_default_promo: - **Promo:** `Have any issues...? Join our Discord: <your link>`
panel_channel.broadcast_help_note_2: Color tags (`<PN>`, `<PR>`, etc.) only work in WelcomeMessage.txt.
panel_channel.broadcast_modal_promo_placeholder: Have any issues? Join our Discord: {discord_link}
panel_channel.warn_restart_bot_apply_broadcasts: Saved to .env. Restart bot to apply changes.
panel_channel.option_desc_edit_connection: Edit RCON and game port settings
panel_channel.option_desc_add_managed_server: Add a new managed game server
panel_channel.option_desc_rebuild_local_data: Rebuild local data from server files
panel_channel.option_desc_factory_reset: Wipe local data and rebuild from scratch
panel_channel.panel_layout_rejected_initial: Panel started, but the full layout was rejected by Discord. Check logs.
panel_channel.panel_layout_rejected_update: Panel update failed - layout rejected by Discord.
panel_channel.managed_servers_omitted_notice: Additional managed server containers omitted: **{{count}}** (Discord limit: {{limit}} components/message).
panel_channel.control_center_active_view_help:
Active view: **{{viewLabel}}**
Use the menus below to manage the bot and servers.
panel_channel.modules_need_attention_note: -# {{count}} module(s) need attention - tap **Diagnostics** in Control Center
panel_channel.quick_action_restart_bot_line: -# **Restart Bot** - Restart the bot process (brief downtime)
panel_channel.quick_action_factory_reset_line: -# **Factory Reset** - Wipe all data and re-build from scratch
panel_channel.quick_action_reimport_line: -# **Re-Import** - Re-download server files and rebuild stats
panel_channel.quick_action_diagnostics_line: -# **System Diagnostics** - Live connectivity probes, module health, suggestions
panel_channel.primary_server_panel_subtitle: -# Panel API - Auto-updating - Controls require Administrator
panel_channel.backups_empty_help: No backups yet. Use **Server Actions -> Backup** to create one.
panel_channel.config_restart_required: Restart required for {{count}} setting(s) to take effect
panel_channel.config_restart_server: Server runtime will restart to apply changes
panel_channel.config_restart_process: Bot restart required to apply changes
panel_channel.ms_label_sftp_password_key: SFTP Password (blank if using SSH key)
panel_channel.ms_label_ssh_key_path: SSH Key Path on bot host (optional)
panel_channel.ms_placeholder_key_auth: Leave blank if using key auth
panel_channel.ms_placeholder_no_keys: No keys found — use password instead
panel_channel.ms_placeholder_promo_broadcast: Have any issues? Join our Discord: {discord_link}
panel_channel.ms_err_required_fields: ❌ Name, RCON Host, and RCON Password are required.
panel_channel.ms_err_session_expired: ❌ Session expired. Please start over with "Add Server".
panel_channel.ms_err_sftp_required: ❌ SFTP host, username, and either a password or SSH key path are required.
panel_channel.ms_err_no_sftp: ❌ No SFTP credentials configured for this server.
panel_channel.ms_err_no_sftp_short: ❌ No SFTP credentials for this server.
panel_channel.ms_ok_step1_complete:
✅ **Step 1 complete!** Server "{{name}}" connection configured.

**Next:** Configure SFTP for log watching, player stats, and save reading (file paths auto-discover).
Or skip SFTP to inherit the primary server's connection.
You can also configure channels or save now.
panel_channel.ms_ok_sftp_configured:
✅ **SFTP configured!** `{{host}}:{{port}}`
File paths will auto-discover when the server starts.

**Next:** Configure channels or save now.
panel_channel.ms_ok_server_added:
✅ **{{name}}** added and started!
• RCON: `{{rcon}}`
• Game Port: `{{gamePort}}`
• Channels: {{channels}} configured
• SFTP: {{sftp}}
panel_channel.ms_ok_server_added_no_channels:
✅ **{{name}}** added (no channels configured).
Use the server actions menu to configure channels.
panel_channel.ms_ok_connection_updated: ✅ **{{name}}** connection updated. Server restarted with new settings.
panel_channel.ms_ok_channels_updated: ✅ **{{name}}** channels updated. Server restarted with new settings.
panel_channel.ms_ok_sftp_updated:
✅ **{{name}}** SFTP updated to: {{status}}{{extra}}
Server restarted with new settings.
panel_channel.ms_saving_server: ⏳ **{{name}}** saved — starting up (SFTP discovery may take a moment)...
panel_channel.ms_warn_restart_game_server: ⚠️ **Restart the game server** for these changes to take effect.
panel_channel.ms_warn_restart_toggle: ⚠️ Restart the server to apply toggle changes.
